description: 高德地图 (Amap) Web Service API — geocoding, reverse geocoding, place search, driving routes, and weather. The Web Service API key is sent as the 'key' query param.

credentialFields.name: apiKey
credentialFields.label: Web Service Key
credentialFields.description: Create an application at https://console.amap.com/dev/key/app and add a key of type 'Web服务' (Web Service). Sent as the 'key' query param.

tools.name: amap_geocode
tools.description: Geocode a structured address into coordinates (地理编码).

params.name: address
params.description: Structured address, e.g. 北京市朝阳区阜通东大街6号.

params.name: city
params.description: City name or adcode to scope the search.

tools.name: amap_regeocode
tools.description: Reverse-geocode coordinates into an address (逆地理编码).

tools.name: amap_place_text
tools.description: Keyword place search (关键字搜索). Supply keywords or types (at least one).

params.name: keywords
params.description: Search keywords, e.g. 北京大学. Required unless 'types' is supplied.

params.name: types
params.description: POI type codes. Required unless 'keywords' is supplied.

params.name: city
params.description: City name or adcode to scope the search.

tools.name: amap_driving_route
tools.description: Driving route planning between two points (驾车路径规划, v5).

params.name: show_fields
params.description: Comma-separated extra result fields, e.g. cost,navi,polyline.

tools.name: amap_weather
tools.description: Weather query by city adcode (天气查询).

params.name: city
params.description: City adcode, e.g. 110101 (use amap_geocode to resolve an adcode).
